name: 11L XSA + LeakyReLU(0.5)² + Legal Score-First TTT (ADIITJ)
author: Atharva Date
blurb: 11-layer transformer with XSA (all layers), partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN scale (1/sqrt(L+1)), VE128 (layers 9,10), LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation, BigramHash(2048), SWA, INT6+zstd-22. Legal score-first TTT at eval: sequential 32K-token chunks, score then adapt, all blocks unfrozen, SGD(lr=0.002, mom=0.9), 3 epochs/chunk, cosine LR. Attribution: PR #503 (EthanYangTW), PR #518 (sofiabod), PR #549 (abaybektursun).
